note: Every source belongs to an evidentiary LINEAGE (Art. XI). Sources in one lineage count as ONE evidentiary vote — their concordance is NOT independent replication. Cross-lineage agreement IS informative. Promotes the no-human Stage-2 audit (branch research/no-human-structural-decipherment, commit ac327a7) to a repo-wide, enforceable artifact; consumed by scripts/source_dependency.py and feeds effective_n (Art. VIII) + the information-budget panel's source-dependency field (Art. IX). independence_demonstrated defaults false (Art. XI/VIII: dependent until proven independent).

L_LB_DECIPHERMENT.desc: Linear B phonetic reading — the Ventris 1952 decipherment and everything descending from it (corpus databases + lexica). Their agreement is MODEL_REPLICATION of one decipherment, not independent consensus.

L_LB_STRUCTURE.desc: Edition-independent structural rules (numeral->quantity, logogram->commodity, total-position->document-structure) — the ONLY Linear B signal that does NOT depend on the phonetic decipherment; genuinely independent of L_LB_DECIPHERMENT.

L_LA_CORPUS.desc: Linear A transcription lineage — GORILA sign-readings and databases descending from it. Linear A is UNDECIPHERED, so this is a graphotactic/transcription lineage (no phonetic reading to share), but sources still share the GORILA transcription conventions.

L_SIGN_HOMOMORPHY.desc: Scholarly analysis of LA<->LB sign shape correspondence; derives from the GORILA LA sign list + the LB sign inventory.

L_LB_METROLOGY.desc: Mycenaean metrological system (fractional/measure signs) — credited independently of the lexical decipherment (Bennett).

L_EGYPT_TOPONYM.desc: Egyptian topographical-list editions (New Kingdom EN lists incl. Kom el-Hetan) — an Egyptological tradition INDEPENDENT of the Aegean lineages (cross-domain).

SRC-DECIPHERMENT-1952.name: Ventris 1952 decipherment of Linear B
SRC-DECIPHERMENT-1952.biblio: Ventris & Chadwick 1953, JHS 73 'Evidence for Greek dialect in the Mycenaean archives'
SRC-DECIPHERMENT-1952.known_disputes: the decipherment itself is accepted; individual readings vary

SRC-DAMOS.name: DAMOS — Database of Mycenaean at Oslo
SRC-DAMOS.underlying_edition: GORILA + standard LB editions (KT, PTT, TITHEMY, Thebes)
SRC-DAMOS.note: structure-only fields (series/hand/numerals/logograms) feed SRC-STRUCTURAL-RULES, which IS edition-independent; the transliteration is NOT.

SRC-VC-DOCS2.name: Ventris & Chadwick, Documents in Mycenaean Greek (2nd ed.)
SRC-VC-DOCS2.known_disputes: glossary readings occasionally revised by DMic

SRC-DMIC.name: Aura Jorro, Diccionario Micenico (DMic)
SRC-DMIC.known_disputes: explicitly builds on and cites V-C -> NOT independent of it

SRC-LIBER.name: LiBER — Linear B Electronic Resources (layout edition)

SRC-STRUCTURAL-RULES.name: edition-independent structural rules
SRC-STRUCTURAL-RULES.note: the ONLY LB signal independent of the decipherment; agreeing with a lexicon IS informative cross-lineage evidence.

SRC-GORILA.name: GORILA — Recueil des inscriptions en Lineaire A
SRC-GORILA.known_disputes: LA is undeciphered — sign transcription conventions, not readings

SRC-SIGLA.name: SigLA — The Signs of Linear A (database)

SRC-BENNETT-METROLOGY.name: Bennett — Mycenaean metrology
SRC-BENNETT-METROLOGY.biblio: Bennett, The Pylos Tablets / Mycenaean fractional system
SRC-BENNETT-METROLOGY.known_disputes: J=1/2 credited to Bennett (logos metrology null)

SRC-EDEL-GORG-2005.name: Edel & Gorg — Ortsnamenlisten (Kom el-Hetan)
SRC-EDEL-GORG-2005.underlying_edition: autopsy of the Amenophis III temple lists
SRC-EDEL-GORG-2005.known_disputes: Aegean-toponym identifications (Knossos/Amnisos/etc.) debated; Falttafeln 13/14 absent from the logos scan
SRC-EDEL-GORG-2005.note: cross-domain: independent of ALL Aegean lineages.

SRC-KITCHEN-RI.name: Kitchen — Ramesside Inscriptions
SRC-KITCHEN-RI.known_disputes: different collation of overlapping monuments vs Edel-Gorg
SRC-KITCHEN-RI.note: shares monuments with Edel-Gorg -> same lineage unless a specific reading is independently collated.

rulings.collapse_rule: For any set of cited sources, collapse to distinct lineages; agreement WITHIN one lineage is one evidentiary vote (Art. XI). effective_source_count = number of distinct lineages.
rulings.shared_decipherment: DAMOS + Ventris-Chadwick + DMic (+ LiBER) are ALL L_LB_DECIPHERMENT — never count their agreement as independent replication; collapse to 1.
rulings.cross_lineage_is_informative: STRUCTURAL_RULES (L_LB_STRUCTURE) agreeing with a lexicon (L_LB_DECIPHERMENT) IS independent cross-lineage evidence; likewise any Aegean lineage vs L_EGYPT_TOPONYM.
rulings.la_corpus: GORILA + SigLA + silver are ALL L_LA_CORPUS (shared transcription); collapse to 1 — but LA is undeciphered, so this shares transcriptions, not readings.
rulings.egyptian_intra_lineage: Edel-Gorg + Kitchen share monuments (L_EGYPT_TOPONYM); a single toponym reading counts once unless independently collated (independence_demonstrated per reading).
